select_project_for_awarding_desc: Select a Housing Loan Program project to add awarding

no_pending_approvals_desc: Projects awaiting approval will appear here

no_extensions: No extensions. Click 'Add Extension' to add a new extension.
extensions_description: Add extensions for the project. Project end date will be calculated automatically based on extensions.
start_order_required_for_extensions: Start order must be added first before adding extensions.
project_schedule_not_added: Project schedule has not been added yet. Click 'Add' to add the data.
select_project_for_schedule_desc: Select a final approved project to add project schedule
add_progress_desc: Add technical progress for the project
progress_current_placeholder: If not entered, will be set to approved
progress_current_help: If not entered, will be set to approved automatically
progress_current_min_error: Current progress must be >= Approved progress
progress_range_error: Approved progress must be between 0 and 100
progress_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
progress_tip_advance: Advance payment made before work starts, recovered gradually from invoices.
progress_tip_total_due: Total due = contractor entitlement - all payments (including advance).
progress_tip_technical_current: The approved technical progress percentage as reported by the engineer, calculated as a weighted average of owner, bank, and variations progress based on their respective contract values.
progress_tip_technical_approved: Approved financial claims based on invoices issued. Calculated on total project value incl. VAT.
progress_tip_financial: The total amount paid to the contractor as a percentage of the contractor's total entitlement. Includes all active payments from owner and bank.
progress_tip_invoice_approved: Based on contractor entitlement only — the actual amount payable to the contractor.
progress_tip_gap: The difference between total invoices and regular payments (excluding advance payment). Positive value means amounts due to contractor, negative means overpayment.
progress_view_permission_required: You can add progress entries, but you do not have permission to view progress history.
progress_allowed_file_types: Allowed: PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP (max 10MB)
progress_validation_below_previous: Value ({{current}}%) must be greater than or equal to previous value ({{previous}}%)
progress_tip_actual_current: The current technical progress as observed on site by the engineer.
progress_bank_min_10_error: Bank does not accept values between 0 and 10% (only 0 or ≥10% is allowed)
progress_owner_100_warning: Owner Base is at 100%. Variations will start from 0% independently.

setup_internal_code_help_ar: Must start with M, followed by odd digits only (1,3,5,7,9).
setup_contract_type_hint_ar: For site plan/license path, choose New Contract.
contractor_name_placeholder: Write or search for contractor name
contractor_not_found: Not found — write a new name
auto_final_approve_note: The project will be automatically final-approved after creation without needing to submit for approval or wait for manager.
contract_contractor_from_bank: Actual Contractor Amount from Bank Share
contract_contractor_from_owner: Actual Contractor Amount from Owner Share
contract_actual_contract_amount: Actual Contract Amount for Contractor (Including VAT)
contract_excel_table_title: In case of a residential loan financing contract
contract_note_total_contract: The total contract amount, which includes the contractor's works plus the consultant's fees, if applicable.
contract_note_fee_pct: The consultant's fee percentage calculated based on the contractor's actual work value.
contract_note_fee_total: Total consultant fee amount, deducted from the total contract amount.
contract_note_net_total: The net value of the contractor's works after deducting the consultant's fees, if applicable, from the total contract amount.
contract_note_bank_total: Total amount financed by the bank, which includes the contractor's works plus consultant's fees, if applicable.
contract_note_bank_fee_pct: The consultant's percentage is calculated based on the actual contractor's work value financed by the bank.
contract_note_bank_fee: The value of the consultant's fees deducted from the bank's total financing.
contract_note_bank_net: The actual contractor's work value financed by the bank, after deducting consultant's fees (if applicable).
contract_note_owner_total: Total amount financed by the Owner, which includes the contractor's works plus consultant's fees, if applicable.
contract_note_owner_fee_pct: The consultant's percentage is calculated based on the actual contractor's work value financed by the Owner.
contract_note_owner_fee: The value of the consultant's fees deducted from the owner's total financing.
contract_note_owner_net: The actual contractor's work value financed by the Owner, after deducting consultant's fees (if applicable).
contract_note_extra_fees: Extra fees deducted from the total financing.
total_contract_value_excluding_consultan: Original contract value excluding bank consultant fees and any owner consultant fees paid directly by the owner to the consultant.
overpaid_note: Client paid more than contract value
bank_contract_net_tooltip: Bank share after deducting the consultant fee paid directly by the bank to the consultant.
total_contract_value_tooltip: Total contract value including all consultant fees (owner and bank shares combined).
bank_share_tooltip: Bank's gross share including the consultant fee paid directly by the bank to the consultant.
owner_share_tooltip: Owner's gross share including the consultant fee paid to the contractor.
variation_amount_tooltip: Total approved variation orders excluding consultant fees.
total_payments_tooltip: All payments received. Bank payments are net (no VAT); owner payments include VAT.
remaining_amount_tooltip: Based on contract value excluding bank consultant fee, plus approved variations and prolongation fees (incl. VAT).
bank_payments_tooltip: Total payments made by the bank to the contractor (net).
owner_payments_tooltip: Total payments made by the owner Including (VAT on Bank), Variation amounts and consultant fees.

errors.total_project_value_positive: Total project value must be a positive number.
errors.bank_value_nonnegative: Bank financing must be a non-negative number.

wizard.confirm_return_desc: Are you sure you want to go back? Unsaved changes will be lost.
wizard.step_disabled: This step is not available yet

no_projects_desc: No projects match the selected filters
pending_approvals_description: Projects awaiting your approval on the current stage
reject_confirmation: Are you sure you want to reject this project?
fe_actual_vo_excl_fees: Actual Approved Variation Works Value (Excluding Consultant Fees)
fe_actual_vo_excl_fees_note: The actual financial value of officially approved variation works, representing the contractor's entitlement for execution only, excluding any consultant fees.
fe_consultant_fees_on_vo: Total Consultant Fees on Variation Orders
fe_consultant_fees_on_vo_note: Total consultant fees applicable to all approved variation orders for the project (including both percentage-based and fixed amounts) allocated to the Owner's financing share.
fe_fixed_consultant_fees_on_vo: Total Fixed Consultant Fees on Variation Orders
fe_fixed_consultant_fees_on_vo_note: Represents fixed consultant fees (Fixed Amount) applicable to variation orders, excluded from variation calculations, displayed as a separate item.
fe_total_vo_with_fees: Total Approved Variation Orders Value (Including Consultant Fees)
fe_total_vo_with_fees_note: The total financial value of variation works formally approved by the Owner, including all related consultant fees as per approved variation orders. (Excludes any contractor profit, if applicable)
fe_owner_actual_original: Actual Contract Amount - Owner's Share (Original Contract)
fe_owner_actual_original_note: Represents the value of the contractor's works under the Owner's share as per the original contract, covering execution works only, excluding consultant fees, and before considering any subsequent variation works.
fe_owner_actual_after_vo: Actual Contract Amount - Owner's Share (After Variations)
fe_owner_actual_after_vo_note: Represents the total value of the contractor's works under the Owner's share after including approved variation works, covering execution works only, excluding consultant fees.
fe_owner_total_original: Total Contract Amount - Owner's Share (Original Contract)
fe_owner_total_original_note: Represents the total contract value of the contractor's works under the Owner's share as per the original contract, including consultant fees, and before accounting for any subsequent variation works.
fe_owner_total_after_vo: Total Contract Amount - Owner's Share (After Variations)
fe_owner_total_after_vo_note: Represents the total contract value of the contractor's works under the Owner's share after including approved variation works, inclusive of consultant fees.
fe_bank_actual_original: Actual Contract Amount - Bank's Share (Original Contract)
fe_bank_actual_original_note: Represents the value of the contractor's works under the Bank's share as per the original contract, covering execution works only, excluding consultant fees, and not affected by variation works, as such variations are allocated solely to the Owner's financing share.
fe_bank_total_original: Total Contract Amount - Bank's Share (Original Contract)
fe_bank_total_original_note: Represents the total contract value of the contractor's works under the Bank's share as per the original contract, inclusive of consultant fees, and remains fixed and unaffected by any subsequent variation works.
fe_total_actual_after_vo: Actual Contract Amount for the Project After Variations
fe_total_actual_after_vo_note: Represents the actual value of the contractor's works for the project after approved variation works, including the actual contract amount under the original contract for both the Owner's and Bank's financing shares, plus the actual value of variation works, excluding any consultant fees.
fe_total_gross_after_vo: Total Contract Amount for the Project After Variations
fe_total_gross_after_vo_note: Represents the total contract value of the contractor's works for the project after approved variation works, including the total contract amount under the original contract inclusive of consultant fees, plus the total approved value of variation works inclusive of consultant fees, if applicable.
fe_final_payable_note: The total amount contractually due to the contractor (after approved variations, if any), including consultant fees paid by the contractor as per contract, VAT inclusive.
fe_total_payments_made_note: The total of all payments actually made to the contractor by the Owner and the Bank according to their respective shares. (Payments are stored with VAT)
fe_owner_payments_to_date_note: Total payments made by the Owner to the contractor up to the specified date. (Payments are stored with VAT)
fe_bank_payments_to_date_note: Total payments made by the Bank to the contractor up to the specified date under the approved financing schedule.
fe_completion_percentages: Financial Completion Percentages (Linked to Payments Received)
fe_owner_completion: Owner's Share Completion Percentage (Based on Latest Payment)
fe_owner_completion_note: Represents the financial completion percentage of the Owner's share, calculated based on the latest payment relative to the total contractual obligation.
fe_bank_completion: Bank's Share Completion Percentage (Based on Latest Payment)
fe_bank_completion_note: Represents the financial completion percentage of the Bank's share based on the latest approved payment relative to the total financing commitment.
fe_owner_outstanding_note: The difference between the Owner's obligation and payments made by the Owner.
fe_bank_outstanding_note: The difference between the Bank's obligation and payments made by the Bank.
fe_total_outstanding: Outstanding Balance of the Contractor from the Total Contractual Entitlements for the Entire Project
fe_total_outstanding_note: The difference between the final contractor payable amount and total payments made.
fe_deferred_amount_note: Amounts temporarily financed by the contractor on behalf of the Owner, deferred for repayment until a later stage (e.g., Initial Handover), deducted only for account status assessment.
fe_net_payable_owner: Net Payable Amount - Owner's Share (After Deferred Funding) as of {{date}}
fe_net_payable_owner_note: The net payable amount currently due from the owner after deducting contractor-funded deferred amounts.
fe_net_payable_percentage: Owner's Net Payable Percentage After Deducting Contractor-Funded Deferred Amount (as of {{date}})
fe_net_payable_percentage_note: Represents the percentage of the Owner's financial obligation currently payable, calculated after deducting any contractor-funded deferred amounts on behalf of the Owner, as of the specified date.
fe_final_account: Adjusted Balance and Final Account Status
fe_total_payable_to_date_note: The total amount payable to the contractor as of the specified date.
fe_adjusted_total_payments: Total Payments Made + Contractor-Funded Deferred Amount
fe_adjusted_total_payments_note: The total actual payments made plus contractor-funded deferred amounts.
fe_payment_status_note: Financial account status (Balanced / Outstanding / Overpaid) after all adjustments.
chat_welcome: How can I help you today?
chat_q_remaining_balance: What is the remaining balance for the owner?
company_background_image_hint: Recommended: wide landscape image (1920x1080 or similar).
company_letter_head_template_hint: Upload your company letterhead as a full A4 PNG image. It will be used as the background of extension letters and other official documents.
company_stamp_hint: Upload your official company stamp (PNG with transparent background recommended). It will appear on variation orders after final approval by the General Manager.
company_admin_set_hint: Basic company data set by the system administrator.
company_admin_readonly_note: These fields are managed by the system administrator and cannot be modified here.
company_unified_info_hint: Your company data as it appears on official documents and reports.
company_signature_hint: Approved company signature image for official documents.
company_contractor_info_hint: This data represents your company as a contractor on official documents and reports.
company_subscription_readonly_note: Subscription details are managed by the system administrator and cannot be modified here.
company_appearance_hint: Customize your company logo, login background, and brand colors.
company_logo_hint: Recommended: square image (512x512) in PNG or SVG format.
company_information_hint: Basic company details and contact information.
company_owner_account_hint: Manage the company owner's personal account details.
pc_net_amount_due_description: Net Amount Due = Subtotal − Previous Claims − Advance Recovery − Other Deductions
pc_step_work_value_tip: Total entitled from contract based on completion = A + B + C
pc_step_deductions_tip: All amounts deducted = G + I + J
pc_net_amount_info: Actual amount due for payment in this claim
onboarding_enter_company_description: Enter a brief description of your company
onboarding_confirm_description: Review your information and click 'Save & Complete' to finish the setup.
variation_edit_not_allowed_desc: Cannot edit a variation order after final approval from upper management.
confirm_delete_consultant: Are you sure you want to delete this consultant?
siteplan_will_be_added_later: Site plan will be added later
contract_attachments_note: Contractual documents and attachments are uploaded in the Contract Attachments section below
